notes: Seed routes are intentionally minimal and should be narrowed or expanded in lockstep with implemented TypeScript handlers.
Routes with an implemented_* status must have a matching entry in apps/api/src/routes.ts and a matching current Python route snapshot.
Deferred scratch-proof routes are retained as future candidates only; they are not implemented by the tracked TypeScript API slice yet.
